name: Mint Strawberry Coconut Cooler
instructions: Wash and clean fresh fruits and herbs (lemon juice, strawberries). Chill the liquid base (coconut water or almond milk) thoroughly.

name: Moong Dal Halwa
instructions: Prep the halwa base (soaked moong dal) by grating or grinding. Measure the ghee, almond milk, and spices (cardamom, saffron).
